# s2_locations (Data Source)

Lists S2 basin placement locations available to the account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "s2_locations" "available" {}

output "available_locations" {
  value = data.s2_locations.available.locations
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `locations` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--locations))

<a id="nestedatt--locations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `locations`

Read-Only:

- `is_private` (Boolean)
- `name` (String)
